svg.title: AgroNomi full mesh — corrected path priorities
svg.desc: Hub at top. Three field pods below connected via LoRa only. Greenhouse bottom-centre connected via WiFi (primary) and LoRa RNode (resilience). All nodes send LXMF to FarmLXMFHub.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the hub run — rnsd, FarmLXMFHub, what else?')
g.text: Mac Mini · rnsd · RNode USB · WiFi LAN

g.onclick: sendPrompt('sn_soil firmware — how does it discover the hub?')
sendPrompt('sn_air firmware — how does it discover the hub?')
sendPrompt('What does the field RNode do — is it running rnsd?')
sendPrompt('sn_soil firmware — how does it discover the hub?')
sendPrompt('sn_air firmware — how does it discover the hub?')
sendPrompt('What does the field RNode do — is it running rnsd?')
sendPrompt('sn_soil firmware — how does it discover the hub?')
sendPrompt('sn_air firmware — how does it discover the hub?')
sendPrompt('What does the field RNode do — is it running rnsd?')
sendPrompt('What does an_greenhouse sense and send?')
sendPrompt('How does an_pump receive commands via LXMF?')
sendPrompt('Why does sn_support have enable_transport True?')
sendPrompt('How does RNS choose WiFi over LoRa in the greenhouse?')
sendPrompt('When does the greenhouse fall back to LoRa RNode?')

svg.text: RNS routes via WiFi when path known · switches to RNode when WiFi path stales
sn_support relays for nodes not on WiFi · LXMF commands in, telemetry out
an_pump + an_greenhouse connect to sn_support BLE server or WiFi directly
no deep sleep — persistent connections, actuator commands arrive any time
LoRa RNode — only path for fields, resilience for greenhouse
